scenarios.label: China office
scenarios.blurb: Real hand-carried lidar + camera tour of a 3-storey office (full session: 890 MB .rrd + 10 GB mem2.db, ~20 min, 558 camera / 11,944 lidar frames). Static building; one person present.

scenarios.label: DimSim spatial memory
scenarios.blurb: Simulated Go2 walkthrough e2e (dimsim_spatial_memory.rrd, 411 MB) — tagged places + a 'go to the bed' spatial-recall run in DimSim.

scenarios.label: Human activity (NPCs)
scenarios.blurb: DimSim populated with scripted human NPCs running scheduled everyday tasks (human_activity.rrd). Activity-recognition e2e — under active development.
